table-580-580.caption: Write all comments made on the post titled 'How does gentle boosting differ from AdaBoost?'
data: Gentle boosting is less sensitive to noisy data.
AdaBoost gives higher weights to misclassified instances.
Gentle boosting uses a different loss function.
Does that mean gentle boosting can be faster?
Yes, in some cases gentle boosting can be faster than AdaBoost.
